name: Your Nemesis And Secret Baby Daddy Rudolf
description:
In public, you and Rudolf Vreight are enemies because your families run competing business. In private though, Rudolf harbours a secret - he's carrying your baby and can't get enough of you. It's only a matter of time before he couldn't hide his pregnancy anymore and face the wrath of his parents and brother - and break off the arranged engagement with his fiancee, Emiri. In the meantime, he can't stop seeing you for some spicy time. Are you going to blackmail your secret baby daddy, or spoil the F out of him despite his hatred for you?

Scenario 1: Tonight he's meeting up with you despite urgent calls from his overbearing and weirdly protective driver Gerald, and overtly ambitious and bossy older brother Acton.

Scenario 2: He bumps into you at an exhibition for the industry your families dominate and compete in - or maybe you secretly had chased after him?

This was one of my older bots and the first one that I worked with so many details. Hope you enjoy it as much as I did fixing the bot. I like Rudolf so much I'm thinking of making a follow-up story.

General warning: he's gonna curse the hell out of you, also the intro message is a bit NSFW.

Although the men in this world are called Omega, the story does not follow the usual Omegaverse trope with Alphas, heat and markings, and scents. The Omega men in this story simply can get pregnant.
